message:
feat: add rate-limit admin visibility + metrics endpoint (Phase 3 of #8676) (#8784)

Add GET /api/admin/rate-limit-status returning a snapshot of all tracked
keys with failure count, tier (normal/escalate/soft-lock/hard-lock),
last-failure timestamp, and Retry-After value. Demo mode returns an
empty set.

Emit structured slog.Error with event=rate_limit_hard_lock when a key
crosses the hard-lock threshold (21+ failures) so GA4 error monitors
can alert on brute-force attempts.

Refactor GetRetryAfter to share retryAfterForCount helper, removing
duplicated tier-switch logic.

Fixes #8676

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -944,6 +944,10 @@ func (s *Server) setupRoutes() {
 	api.Get("/namespaces", namespaces.ListNamespaces)
 	api.Get("/namespaces/:name/access", namespaces.GetNamespaceAccess)
 
+	// Admin visibility routes — rate-limit metrics (#8676 Phase 3).
+	adminHandler := handlers.NewAdminHandler(failureTracker)
+	api.Get("/admin/rate-limit-status", adminHandler.GetRateLimitStatus)
+
 	// Mission knowledge base routes (validate, share — protected)
 	missions.RegisterRoutes(api.Group("/missions"))
